purpose: Keep guide presentation, invocation, adoption, artifact outcome, and resources as distinct observations without turning exposure or artifact similarity into cognitive evidence.

presentation.observed_if: The exact hashed public-guide.md is mounted read-only in the public_skill task namespace and absent from no_skill.

invocation.observed_if: A complete retained tool-event ledger contains a successful read of public-guide.md with event identity, path, and content hash.
invocation.unavailable_reason: The pinned Hermes stdout/redacted trace is not declared a complete file-tool event ledger, so this launcher must report invocation unavailable even if prose mentions the guide.

adoption.observed_if: A prospectively defined guide-unique proposition is linked from a complete invocation event to an agent action and independently verified artifact consequence; no such guide-unique proposition exists in this task because guide steps overlap public requirements.
adoption.not_observed_reason: No guide-unique, causally linked proposition is available; presentation, guide mention, rubric alignment, and artifact similarity are insufficient.

artifact_outcome.observed_from: Hash inventory and both frozen parent rubrics over identical output bytes.

resources.observed_from: Provider-native call events and retained aggregate usage under the v4 coordinate contract.

claim_boundary: The rule supports descriptive flow reporting only. A single ordered pair cannot license an allocation effect, Skill effect, capability, expert/professional validity, economic value, production fitness, or readiness claim.
